publications.title: Spatial Affordance-Aware Affine Transformation Between Heterogeneous Spaces for Mixed Reality Remote Collaboration
publications.abstract: This work presents a spatial-affordance-aware transformation approach for aligning heterogeneous physical environments in mixed reality remote collaboration. The method focuses on preserving task-relevant spatial relationships while adapting shared content and interaction across dissimilar rooms.

publications.title: Task Breakpoint Generation using Origin-Centric Graph in Virtual Reality Recordings for Adaptive Playback
publications.abstract: This paper investigates how task breakpoints can be generated from origin-centric graph representations of VR recordings. The resulting structure supports adaptive playback by identifying meaningful boundaries in recorded task sequences.
publications.figureCaption: Automatically extracted figure candidate. Review before publishing.

publications.title: VR Zen Garden: Designing a Virtual Environment for Stress Relief
publications.abstract: VR Zen Garden explores the design of a calm virtual environment intended to support stress relief. The project combines spatial composition and restorative interaction cues in an immersive setting.

publications.title: Architectural Elements Augmentation from 2D Artworks for Spatial Experience of AR Exhibition
publications.abstract: This project explores how architectural elements inferred from two-dimensional artworks can be augmented to create a spatial AR exhibition experience.

publications.title: Human-Scene Interaction Data Generation with Virtual Environment using User-Centric Scene Graph
publications.abstract: This paper proposes generating human-scene interaction data in a virtual environment through a user-centric scene graph.

publications.title: Meta-Objects: Interactive and Multisensory Virtual Objects Learned From the Real World for Use in Augmented Reality
publications.abstract: Meta-Objects introduces interactive and multisensory virtual objects learned from real-world examples for augmented reality. The work examines how captured object properties can support richer behavior and perception in spatial experiences.
publications.figureCaption: Automatically extracted figure candidate. Review before publishing.

publications.title: Mutual Space Representation Standardization for Mixed and Augmented Reality Remote Collaboration
publications.abstract: This work examines a standardized representation of mutual space for mixed and augmented reality remote collaboration. It aims to make spatial information interoperable across participants, devices, and differently configured environments.

publications.title: Object Cluster Registration of Dissimilar Rooms Using Geometric Spatial Affordance Graph to Generate Shared Virtual Spaces
publications.abstract: This paper introduces object-cluster registration for dissimilar rooms using a geometric spatial affordance graph. By matching task-relevant object relationships, the method supports the generation of shared virtual spaces across different physical layouts.

publications.title: Spatial Affordance-aware Interactable Subspace Allocation for Mixed Reality Telepresence
publications.abstract: This work presents spatial-affordance-aware allocation of interactable subspaces for mixed reality telepresence. It identifies usable regions in each environment and maps interaction spaces to support collaboration despite layout differences.
publications.figureCaption: Automatically extracted figure candidate. Review before publishing.

publications.title: The Effects of Spatial Configuration on Relative Translation Gain Thresholds in Redirected Walking
publications.abstract: This study examines how spatial configuration affects relative translation gain thresholds in redirected walking. It investigates perceptual sensitivity to movement manipulation under different environmental arrangements.
publications.figureCaption: Automatically extracted figure candidate. Review before publishing.

publications.title: Bring Store in My Room: AR Store Authoring System for Spatial Experience in Mobile Shopping
publications.abstract: Bring Store in My Room is an AR authoring system that brings a store-like spatial experience into a user’s room for mobile shopping.

publications.title: TranSlider: User-Controlled Augmented Content Presence Visualization in AR Collaboration
publications.abstract: TranSlider explores a user-controlled visualization for expressing the presence of augmented content in AR collaboration.
